roots.notes: Same as FAUNA_BULL questions about root vs composite status.

roots.plain_english: Bullish 3-bar FVG: prior bar's body (or range) exceeds disp_mult × stdev (default 5×) AND a bullish FVG forms (low > high[2] AND close[1] > open[1]).
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND disp_rng[1] > disp_thresh[1] AND low > high[2] AND close[1] > open[1]

parameters.name: disp_type
parameters.units: enum {Open to Close, High to Low}

roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — det_DISPBull feeds S3/S4/S6/UU paths; bar[1] anchor)
roots.notes: Anchored to the FVG-creation bar via offset=-1 in plotshapes that consume it.

roots.plain_english: Bearish 3-bar FVG: prior bar's body (or range) exceeds disp_mult × stdev AND a bearish FVG forms (high < low[2] AND close[1] < open[1]).
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND disp_rng[1] > disp_thresh[1] AND high < low[2] AND close[1] < open[1]
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — det_DISPBear consumed by S3/S4/S6/UU; bar[1] anchor)
roots.notes: Mirror of DISPBull.

roots.plain_english: PBJ bull cross-firing: a Supertrend (over VWMA/EMA/SMA/WMA/HMA base) bullish crossover that lands at a previously-armed PBJ buy level (low < pbj_ma*(1-zoo_thresh), low = lowest of zoo_pbj_hh_ll, vol > avg_vol*zoo_pbj_vol_mult).
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND ta.crossover(close, sig_line) AND wait_pbj_buy
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — det_PBJBull feeds S6/UU and HVD-PBJ chains; bar[0] anchor)
roots.notes: PBJ is the entry-quality refinement of the PB level-approach engine. det_PBBull (line 262) is the lower-tier 'PB but NOT PBJ' classifier — also a named primitive in this file.

roots.plain_english: Mirror PBJ bear: Supertrend bearish crossunder + previously-armed PBJ sell level (high > pbj_ma*(1+zoo_thresh), high = highest of zoo_pbj_hh_ll, vol > avg_vol*zoo_pbj_vol_mult).
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND ta.crossunder(close, sig_line) AND wait_pbj_sell
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — det_PBJBear feeds S6/UU/HVD-PBJ; bar[0] anchor)
roots.notes: Mirror of PBJBull.

roots.plain_english: PB-only bull: Supertrend cross-up at an armed PB level approach but NOT a PBJ-quality level.
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND sig_pb_buy AND NOT sig_pbj_buy
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — building block for UU pathways)
roots.notes: Strict-disjoint partner to PBJBull. Whether this is a 'root' depends on whether PB is named separately in the bible.

roots.plain_english: PB-only bear: mirror of PBBull.
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND sig_pb_sell AND NOT sig_pbj_sell
roots.notes: Mirror of PBBull.

roots.plain_release: RVOL band SAAB bull: rv_baseBull AND rv_normPrice in [0.56× threshold ladder, 1× threshold).
roots.boolean_summary: rv_baseBull AND rv_normPrice >= th_saab AND rv_normPrice < th_1x
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds CS1, S5, UU)
roots.notes: th_saab = th_1x * 0.56 from f_th_saab/f_th_1x ladders.

roots.plain_english: RVOL band Kratos = SAAB-bear analogue: rv_baseBear AND rv_normPrice in [th_saab, th_1x).
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds CS1-bear, S5-bear, UU-bear)

roots.plain_english: RVOL 1× bull: rv_normPrice in [th_1x, th_gs).
RVOL 1× bear: mirror of RVOL1xBull on rv_baseBear.
RVOL Grand Slam bull: rv_normPrice >= th_gs.
RVOL MOAB = Grand Slam bear analogue: rv_baseBear AND rv_normPrice >= th_gs.
Pentagon: tv_ta.relativeVolume(30, '', cumulative=true, sameTime=true) ratio in [th_1x, th_wtc].
WTC: relVol ratio in (th_wtc, th_hiro]. th_wtc = th_1x*2.0.
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds CS2-neutral path and S5 neutral)

roots.plain_english: Hiroshima: relVol ratio > th_hiro.
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds CS2-neutral and S5)

roots.plain_english: Nagasaki: bar volume sets a new running all-time max (rv_isNag).
Highest-volume + Displacement bull: bar[1] is HV (top of 50/100/200/500/1000 OR ever-HV) AND bullish displacement+FVG fires.
roots.boolean_summary: (hv_isHEV OR hv_is1000 OR hv_is500 OR hv_is200 OR hv_is100 OR hv_is50) AND hvd_dispBull
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds S3d/S4d/S6/S17/S18 and UU pathways)
roots.notes: Same disp engine pattern as Engine C, bound to HV-rank bar[1].

roots.plain_english: Mirror HVDBull on bear side.
HVDBull AND PBJ bull on bar[1].
roots.boolean_summary: det_HVDBull AND nz(det_PBJBull[1])

roots.plain_english: Mirror HVDPBJBull bear.

Raw bull TNT: simultaneous (within tnt_CW=2*EMA_SLOW window) confluence of (a) volume-weighted EMA crossover zone, (b) Anish swing-pivot zone, (c) Flux/displacement zone, with strong-bull side test (median-vol gate, EMA slope > 0, RSI < 80, > 30% vertical zone overlap).
roots.boolean_summary: tnt_bConf AND f_tnt_sb(...) AND conf AND (bar_index - tnt_lBSB) > tnt_MIN_SIG_GAP
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds det_bullTNT, charge ladder, event log, CONT, S15)
roots.notes: Must mirror TNT OD. Per CHANGELOG v4.30 the rewrite ported TNT OD's full architecture (3-clause CONT, Return-leg, super-TNT).

roots.plain_english: Mirror TNT_RAW_BULL on the bear side.
Return-to-TNT bull: an active bull TNT zone is touched at retLvl = lower + (upper-lower)*(tnt_RET_PCT/100) by low and close > zone.lower; fires once per zone.
Mirror RetBullTNT on bear-zone side.
Bull Napalm: a bull TNT-internal-displacement bar where the prior bar's low > the level of any active opposing (bear) TNT zone (scans all active bear zones, breaks on first hit).
roots.boolean_summary: conf AND tnt_dBull AND any active bear zone z where low[1] > z.level
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds S13/S16 and CONT/event-log)
roots.notes: v4.30: changed from single tnt_lastBearLvl scan to all-active-zones scan.

roots.plain_english: Mirror Napalm_BULL on bear side.

Bull Charge: bull TNT-internal-displacement bar that violates an unviolated bear ChargeLvl (close[1] > level). On fire, pushes a NEW bull ChargeLvl at low[1] to maintain the alternating-direction ladder (v4.32 fix).
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds CONT, super-TNT, event-log)
roots.notes: v4.32 patched the ladder push (line 611). Anish notes Napalm and Charge are the same conceptual signal.

roots.plain_english: Mirror Charge_BULL on bear side; pushes a new bear ChargeLvl at high[1] on fire.
roots.notes: v4.32 patched the ladder push (line 620).

roots.plain_english: TNT 2.0 bull (super): the bull event-log has 2+ entries (TNT-raw OR Napalm OR effective-Charge), AND any bull event fires this bar, AND > tnt_MIN_SIG_GAP since last.
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — folded into det_bullTNT consolidated)
roots.notes: Bear-event log clears when a bull event fires (and vice versa).

roots.plain_english: Mirror TNT2_BULL on bear side.
Super-TNT bull: raw bull TNT AND bear Charge on the same bar.
roots.boolean_summary: det_bullTNT_raw AND det_bearCharge

roots.plain_english: Mirror SuperTNT_BULL on bear side.
Consolidated bull TNT (matches TNT OD output): raw OR TNT 2.0 OR super-TNT.
roots.boolean_summary: det_bullTNT_raw OR det_bullTNT2 OR det_superBullTNT

roots.plain_english: Consolidated bear TNT mirror.
Bull CONT: 3-clause OR matching TNT OD — (Charge with prior Return within prox) OR ((rawTNT or TNT2) with prior Charge within prox) OR (Charge with prior rawTNT or TNT2 within prox).
roots.notes: tnt_SUDDEN_PROX defaults to 3 bars (was 10 in v4.30).

roots.plain_english: Mirror CONT_BULL on bear side.

FVG-Combo bull (offset=-1): bar[1] body% ≥ cs_bodyPct_FVG AND a bull HV-FVG or GZI fires, AND a directional RVOL hit on bar[1] (SAAB / 1× / GS) OR a Pentagon-tier hit (Pentagon/WTC/Hiroshima/Nagasaki when cs_inc_pent_FVG).
Mirror CS1Bull on bear side (Kratos/RVOL1xR/MOAB OR Pentagon-tier neutral).
Matrix-Combo bull (offset=0): body% ≥ cs_bodyPct_MAT AND (Neo-bull OR Trinity-bull) AND directional RVOL OR Pentagon-tier.
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds S8/S9 unified path)
roots.notes: Neo-bull = is_matrix_number AND FAUNABull; Trinity-bull = is_matrix_number AND NOT FAUNABull AND close>open. is_matrix_number = volume == ta.highest(volume,67).

roots.plain_english: Mirror CS2Bull on bear side.
Unified Combo bull: FVG-Combo bull on bar[0] AND Matrix-Combo bull on bar[1] — both events anchor to the displacement bar (visual bar 1).
roots.boolean_summary: det_CS1Bull AND nz(det_CS2Bull[1])
roots.plot_call: (no direct plot — feeds S8 and S19/S20)

roots.plain_english: Mirror UnifiedBull on bear side.
Long 1 (Squareify): regular RVOL ratio > 7.0 AND cumulative RVOL ratio > 3.5 AND close>open AND body/range ≥ 0.60.
Mirror Long1 for the down side.
UU bull (2-bar): 2-bar qualified-bull streak (rv_baseBull AND rv_normPrice >= 0.5) PLUS one of multiple Squareify A-F pathway dispositions evaluated by f_uu_bull_scan(2).
UUU bull (3-bar streak).
UUUU bull (4+-bar streak).
UU bear mirror (Squareify A-F bearside).
UUU bear mirror.
UUUU bear mirror.
Bullish bar with normalized price spike in the SAAB/Kratos band (between 0.56× the RVOL-1x threshold and the RVOL-1x threshold).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed, bullish candle (close>open), positive price-vs-volume divergence above its SMA, and normalized price spike sits in [SAAB/Kratos threshold, RVOL-1x threshold).
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_SAAB,       title="SAAB",            style=shape.square,       location=location.top,    size=size.tiny,   color=color.lime,    text="SAAB")
roots.notes: Lower-band bullish RVOL spike. Threshold scales with chart timeframe via f_saab_kratos_threshold = 0.56 × f_rvol_1x_threshold(tfSec).

roots.plain_english: Bearish bar with normalized price spike in the SAAB/Kratos band (Kratos = bearish mirror of SAAB).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed, bearish candle (close<open), positive price-vs-volume divergence above its SMA, and normalized price spike sits in [SAAB/Kratos threshold, RVOL-1x threshold).
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_Kratos,     title="Kratos",           style=shape.square,       location=location.bottom, size=size.tiny,   color=color.orange,  text="Krat")
roots.notes: Lower-band bearish RVOL spike. Mirror of SAAB.

roots.plain_english: Bullish bar with normalized price spike in the RVOL-1x band (between RVOL-1x threshold and Grand Slam / MOAB threshold).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed, bullish candle, positive price-vs-volume divergence above its SMA, and normalized price spike sits in [RVOL-1x threshold, Grand Slam/MOAB threshold).
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_BullRVOL1x, title="Bull RVOL 1x",    style=shape.xcross,       location=location.bottom, size=size.small,  color=color.green,   text="RV1x+")
roots.notes: Mid-band bullish RVOL spike.

roots.plain_english: Bearish bar with normalized price spike in the RVOL-1x band.
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed, bearish candle, positive price-vs-volume divergence above its SMA, and normalized price spike sits in [RVOL-1x threshold, Grand Slam/MOAB threshold).
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_BearRVOL1x, title="Bear RVOL 1x",    style=shape.xcross,       location=location.bottom, size=size.small,  color=color.red,     text="RV1x-")
roots.notes: Mid-band bearish RVOL spike.

roots.plain_english: Bullish bar with normalized price spike at or above the Grand Slam / MOAB threshold (top tier of P1).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed, bullish candle, positive price-vs-volume divergence above its SMA, and normalized price spike >= Grand Slam/MOAB threshold.
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_GrandSlam,  title="Grand Slam",       style=shape.triangleup,   location=location.bottom, size=size.normal, color=color.aqua,    text="DINGER")
roots.notes: Highest-tier bullish RVOL spike (P1). Threshold scales with timeframe via f_gs_moab_threshold.

roots.plain_english: Bearish bar with normalized price spike at or above the Grand Slam / MOAB threshold (top tier of P1, bearish mirror).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed, bearish candle, positive price-vs-volume divergence above its SMA, and normalized price spike >= Grand Slam/MOAB threshold.
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_MOAB,       title="MOAB",             style=shape.triangledown, location=location.top,    size=size.normal, color=color.fuchsia, text="MOAB")
roots.notes: Highest-tier bearish RVOL spike (P1). Bearish mirror of Grand Slam.

roots.plain_english: Time-regularized relative volume ratio sits in the Pentagon band (between RVOL-1x threshold and the WTC threshold).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed and relVolRatio is in [RVOL-1x threshold, WTC threshold].
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_Pentagon,   title="Pentagon",          style=shape.diamond,      location=location.top,    size=size.small,  color=color.teal,    text="PENT")
roots.notes: Lowest-tier time-regularized volume ratio (neutral, no candle direction). Uses TradingView/ta/7 relativeVolume().

roots.plain_english: Time-regularized relative volume ratio sits in the WTC band (above WTC threshold up to Hiroshima threshold).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed and relVolRatio is in (WTC threshold, Hiroshima threshold].
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_WTC,        title="WTC",              style=shape.xcross,       location=location.bottom, size=size.normal, color=color.yellow,  text="WTC")
roots.notes: Mid-tier time-regularized volume ratio. WTC threshold = 2.0 × RVOL-1x threshold.

roots.plain_english: Time-regularized relative volume ratio exceeds the Hiroshima threshold (top tier of P2).
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed and relVolRatio > Hiroshima threshold.
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_Hiroshima,  title="Hiroshima",         style=shape.diamond,      location=location.top,    size=size.normal, color=color.white,   text="H")
roots.notes: Top-tier time-regularized volume ratio. Hiroshima threshold equals f_gs_moab_threshold.

roots.plain_english: All-time high volume bar — current bar volume exceeds the running max volume since bar 0.
roots.boolean_summary: Bar confirmed and current volume strictly exceeds the running maximum volume seen so far.
roots.plot_call: plotshape(fire_Nagasaki,   title="Nagasaki (HEV)",   style=shape.flag,         location=location.top,    size=size.normal, color=color.purple,  text="N")
roots.notes: HEV = Highest Ever Volume. No user inputs. Tracked via persistent var maxVol.

roots.plain_english: Fires on a newly detected bullish FVG when a same-polarity (bullish) FVG already exists within gziProximity bars AND the two zones overlap in price (or merely touch when both are HV).
roots.boolean_summary: bull_fvg AND fvg_time != lastTime AND showGZI AND any prior bullish fvg_record with (n - existing.barIdx) <= gziProximity AND (price-overlap OR adjacent-when-both-HV)
roots.plot_call: plotshape(bullGZI_trigger, title="Bullish GZI", style=shape.flag, location=location.top, color=gziBullCss, size=size.normal, offset=-1)
roots.notes: GZI overlap = price overlap (overlap_bottom < overlap_top) OR adjacent (overlap_bottom <= overlap_top) when both existing and new FVG are HV. Same polarity required (existing.isbull). Loop breaks on first match.

roots.plain_english: Fires on a newly detected bearish FVG when a same-polarity (bearish) FVG already exists within gziProximity bars AND the two zones overlap in price (or merely touch when both are HV).
roots.boolean_summary: bear_fvg AND fvg_time != lastTime AND showGZI AND any prior bearish fvg_record with (n - existing.barIdx) <= gziProximity AND (price-overlap OR adjacent-when-both-HV)
roots.plot_call: plotshape(bearGZI_trigger, title="Bearish GZI", style=shape.flag, location=location.top, color=gziBearCss, size=size.normal, offset=-1)
roots.notes: Mirror of GZI_BULL on bearish polarity (not existing.isbull). Adjacent-HV rule and break-on-first-match identical.

roots.plain_english: Fires on a newly detected bullish FVG when the prior bar's volume equals the highest volume over 5000, 252, or 63 bars (HVE / HVY / HVQ milestone).
roots.boolean_summary: bull_fvg AND fvg_time != lastTime AND showHV AND (volume[1] == highest(volume,5000)[1] OR volume[1] == highest(volume,252)[1] OR volume[1] == highest(volume,63)[1])
roots.plot_call: plotshape(bullHV_trigger, title="Bullish HV", style=shape.flag, location=location.belowbar, color=hvBullCss, size=size.normal, offset=-1)
roots.notes: HVE 5000 / HVY 252 / HVQ 63 lookbacks are PARAMETERS of HV root, not separate roots. Uses prior bar (volume[1]) so signal aligns with the FVG-formation bar (the middle bar of the 3-bar gap).

roots.plain_english: Fires on a newly detected bearish FVG when the prior bar's volume equals the highest volume over 5000, 252, or 63 bars (HVE / HVY / HVQ milestone).
roots.boolean_summary: bear_fvg AND fvg_time != lastTime AND showHV AND (volume[1] == highest(volume,5000)[1] OR volume[1] == highest(volume,252)[1] OR volume[1] == highest(volume,63)[1])
roots.plot_call: plotshape(bearHV_trigger, title="Bearish HV", style=shape.flag, location=location.belowbar, color=hvBearCss, size=size.normal, offset=-1)
roots.notes: Mirror of HV_BULL on bearish polarity. HVE/HVY/HVQ lookbacks are parameters, not separate roots.

roots.plain_english: Raw bullish 3-bar Fair Value Gap: current low above the high of two bars ago, with prior close confirming above that gap, and the gap size exceeding an auto (cumulative-avg-range) or manual percentage threshold. Resolved at the user-selected timeframe via request.security.
roots.boolean_summary: low > high[2] AND close[1] > high[2] AND (low - high[2]) / high[2] > threshold   [threshold = auto ? cum((high-low)/low)/bar_index : thresholdPer/100; resolved at tf via request.security; one-shot via fvg_time != lastTime]
roots.plot_call: (no dedicated plotshape; visualized as bullCss FVG box; alertcondition only)
roots.notes: FVG_BULL_RAW is the raw detection root; the GZI_BULL and HV_BULL plots are composites that depend on this root being true (plus their own predicates). Box draw extends n+480 bars (extend = 480, L32, L138). Alert fires when bull_count increments (L240).

roots.plain_english: Raw bearish 3-bar Fair Value Gap: current high below the low of two bars ago, with prior close confirming below that gap, and the gap size exceeding an auto (cumulative-avg-range) or manual percentage threshold. Resolved at the user-selected timeframe via request.security.
roots.boolean_summary: high < low[2] AND close[1] < low[2] AND (low[2] - high) / high > threshold   [threshold = auto ? cum((high-low)/low)/bar_index : thresholdPer/100; resolved at tf via request.security; one-shot via fvg_time != lastTime]
roots.plot_call: (no dedicated plotshape; visualized as bearCss FVG box; alertcondition only)
roots.notes: Mirror of FVG_BULL_RAW. Note bear_fvg_raw uses (low[2] - high) / high in the denominator (vs / high[2] for bull) — verbatim from L71. Box draw extends n+480 bars. Alert fires when bear_count increments (L241).

roots.plain_english: Pipeline-A primitive: prior bar was a high-volume bar (one of the toggled rank tiers 50–1000 base, or HTF profile rank, or all-time HEV) AND prior bar's range exceeded stdev*mult AND a bullish FVG opened on the current bar. Fires on bar N to describe bar N-1; plotted with offset=-1.
roots.boolean_summary: hvd_fire_bull = base_combo_bull or htf1_combo_bull or htf2_combo_bull
roots.plot_call: plotshape(en_hvd_bull and hvd_fire_bull, "HV+D Bull", shape.triangleup,   location.belowbar, color.new(#00E676, 0), text="HV+D", textcolor=color.white, size=size.small, offset=-1)
roots.notes: Composite of three internal primitives (volume-rank, stdev displacement, FVG) but treated as a single root per definition. Internal: ta.highest(volume,N), ta.stdev range, FVG geometry. Plot offset=-1; alert at L1326 (excludes co-occurrence cases).

roots.plain_english: Bear mirror of HVD_BULL: prior bar high-volume rank ∧ prior bar disp ∧ bearish FVG. Pipeline A terminal output.
roots.boolean_summary: hvd_fire_bear = base_combo_bear or htf1_combo_bear or htf2_combo_bear
roots.plot_call: plotshape(en_hvd_bear and hvd_fire_bear, "HV+D Bear", shape.triangledown, location.abovebar, color.new(#FF1744, 0), text="HV+D", textcolor=color.white, size=size.small, offset=-1)
roots.notes: Same internals as HVD_BULL with reversed FVG/displacement direction. Alert at L1328.

roots.plain_english: Pipeline-B bullish PBJ landing: a Supertrend buy_cross (Zoo VWMA-5 vs ATR-band Supertrend) coincident with the PB&J filter (low<EMA20*(1-ATR/close*3) AND low==25-bar lowest AND volume>SMA20*0.1).
roots.boolean_summary: sigBullPBJ = conf and ta.crossover(close, st_signal_line) and wait_pbj_buy
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; consumed by composites + Pipeline D — see PBJ Bull at L1318 within HV+D co-occurrence at offset=-1, and SUPER/FLOOR/HW etc.)
roots.notes: Internal: VWMA + ATR-band Supertrend + PB&J filter. Do NOT decompose into Supertrend/Zoo/VWMA/ATR — those are internal helpers. Pipeline B fires bar N, describes bar N, offset=0. Note: there is no offset=0 standalone plot for sigBullPBJ in this file — it surfaces only via composites and Pipeline D's `hvd_pbj_bull`.

roots.plain_english: Bear mirror of PBJ_BULL: Supertrend sell_cross + PB&J sell filter (high>EMA20*(1+thresh), high==25-bar highest, volume>SMA20*0.1).
roots.boolean_summary: sigBearPBJ = conf and ta.crossunder(close, st_signal_line) and wait_pbj_sell
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; surfaces via composites and Pipeline D)
roots.notes: Mirror of PBJ_BULL with crossunder/highest/upper-band ATR threshold.

roots.plain_english: Pipeline-B bullish 'plain' Pullback (PB) landing: Supertrend buy_cross when price has approached a previously-recorded bullish lander box (from a prior cross or reaccel). Fires only when PBJ filter did NOT also fire.
roots.boolean_summary: sigBullPB = conf and enable_PB and (buy_cross and wait_buy) and not (buy_cross and wait_pbj_buy)
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; consumed via composites and Pipeline D — see HV+D+PB co-shape at L1317)
roots.notes: Internal: Zoo lander array `bull_lvls` of `lvl` (upper/lower/vol/approached) populated by f_add_lander on buy_cross and f_add_reaccel on bull_reaccel; f_check_approach sets wait_buy.

roots.plain_english: Bear mirror of PB_BULL: Supertrend sell_cross + bear lander box approached, excluding PBJ-sell coincidence.
roots.boolean_summary: sigBearPB = conf and enable_PB and (sell_cross and wait_sell) and not (sell_cross and wait_pbj_sell)
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; surfaces via composites and Pipeline D)
roots.notes: Mirror of PB_BULL on bear lvls.

roots.plain_english: Push-Up Day: bar's percent body (close-open)/open*100 > 3% AND volume > 10-bar highest red-bar volume. The classic 'green push' primitive.
roots.boolean_summary: sigPUP = conf and pp_priceUp and volume > pp_hiRedVol
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot in this file; consumed by composites only — Golf, PAF, OD, SUPER, SDuper, alpha-strike etc.)
roots.notes: Engine 5 'PUP/PPD'. Defined locally; NOT plotted as its own shape but is a named root used by many composites.

roots.plain_english: Push-Down Day: bar's percent body (open-close)/open*100 > 3% AND volume > 10-bar highest green-bar volume. Bear mirror of PUP.
roots.boolean_summary: sigPPD = conf and pp_priceDn and volume > pp_hiGreenVol
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; consumed by composites only — Golf Bear, PAF Bear, OD Bear, SUPER/SD Bear etc.)
roots.notes: Engine 5; named root.

roots.plain_english: Pipeline-C displacement: prior bar range > stdev*3.0 (capped *100), AND a bullish FVG opened on current bar (or current-bar disp+green if i_req_fvg=false).
roots.boolean_summary: sigDISPBull = conf and (i_req_fvg ? (disp_prevDisp and disp_bullFVG) : (disp_currDisp and close>open))
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; named root that gates many composites)
roots.notes: Engine 3 USE Displacement. Distinct from Pipeline-A HVD's displacement (which uses different multipliers and FVG semantics).

roots.plain_english: Bear mirror of DISP_BULL.
roots.boolean_summary: sigDISPBear = conf and (i_req_fvg ? (disp_prevDisp and disp_bearFVG) : (disp_currDisp and close<open))
roots.notes: Engine 3 mirror.

roots.plain_english: 5x-stdev displacement primitive (close>open ∧ range>stdev*5.0). Used inside HW Bull composite.
roots.boolean_summary: disp5_bull = conf and disp_std>0 and disp_rng>disp_std*5.0 and close>open
roots.notes: Hardcoded 5x; named primitive used by HW + UU exception.

roots.plain_english: Bear mirror of DISP5_BULL.
roots.boolean_summary: disp5_bear = conf and disp_std>0 and disp_rng>disp_std*5.0 and close<open
roots.notes: Mirror.

roots.plain_english: Volume on prior bar equals 5000-bar highest. The 'all-time' tier of the GZI HV ladder.
roots.boolean_summary: gz_v1 == ta.highest(volume,5000)[1]
roots.plot_call: (no standalone plot; rolled into gz_isHV and gz_bullHV/gz_bearHV)
roots.notes: Named tier of HV ladder used inside GZ1/HV-FVG (Engine 4).

roots.plain_english: Yearly tier — volume on prior bar equals 252-bar highest.

roots.plain_english: Fires on a newly detected bullish FVG when a same-polarity (bullish) FVG already exists within gziProximity bars AND the two zones overlap in price (or merely touch when both are HV).

roots.plain_english: Fires on a newly detected bearish FVG when a same-polarity (bearish) FVG already exists within gziProximity bars AND the two zones overlap in price (or merely touch when both are HV).

roots.plain_english: Raw bullish 3-bar Fair Value Gap: current low above the high of two bars ago, with prior close confirming above that gap, and the gap size exceeding an auto (cumulative-avg-range) or manual percentage threshold. Resolved at the user-selected timeframe via request.security.
roots.boolean_summary: low > high[2] AND close[1] > high[2] AND (low - high[2]) / high[2] > threshold   [threshold = auto ? cum((high-low)/low)/bar_index : thresholdPer/100; resolved at tf via request.security; one-shot via fvg_time != lastTime]
roots.plot_call: (no dedicated plotshape; visualized as bullCss FVG box; alertcondition only)

roots.plain_english: Raw bearish 3-bar Fair Value Gap: current high below the low of two bars ago, with prior close confirming below that gap, and the gap size exceeding an auto (cumulative-avg-range) or manual percentage threshold. Resolved at the user-selected timeframe via request.security.
roots.boolean_summary: high < low[2] AND close[1] < low[2] AND (low[2] - high) / high > threshold   [threshold = auto ? cum((high-low)/low)/bar_index : thresholdPer/100; resolved at tf via request.security; one-shot via fvg_time != lastTime]
roots.plot_call: (no dedicated plotshape; visualized as bearCss FVG box; alertcondition only)
roots.notes: Mirror of FVG_BULL_RAW. Note bear_fvg_raw denominator is /high (vs /high[2] for bull) — verbatim from L71, identical to canonical. Box draw extends n+480 bars. Alert fires when bear_count increments (L241). Stage 1.5 byte-diff vs canonical recommended.

roots.description: Displacement (Engine #1: stdev(100)*5 over abs(open-close), bullFVG/bearFVG required) through an OPPOSITE-SIDE active TNT zone. Bullish Napalm: dispBull AND any active bear TNT zone where low[1] > z.level.
roots.consolidated_into: det_bullNapalm / det_bearNapalm (= raw_napalmBull OR raw_bullCharge)  line 620-621

roots.description: Displacement crosses an opposite-side prior charge level (TNT-zone-derived). On violation a new charge level is pushed at low[1]/high[1].
roots.notes: Effective only when not coincident with an opposite raw_bearTNT/raw_bullTNT (effectiveBullCharge gating, line 555).

roots.description: Event-log path: ≥2 same-direction events (TNT/Napalm/effective-Charge) accumulated, gated by MIN_SIG_GAP. Internally folded into det_bullTNT/det_bearTNT.
Price retraces back into an active TNT zone after breakout (bull: low ≤ retLvl AND close > z.lower). Includes RET TNT 1.0 and RET TNT 2.0 (super-zone variant). Each zone fires return only once.
Three-clause sudden-change/proximity logic — Charge after Return within SUDDEN_PROX bars OR (TNT/TNT2 within SUDDEN_PROX of last Charge) OR Charge within SUDDEN_PROX of last TNT/TNT2.

B2B extreme displacement on bar[1] AND bar[2] using DEDICATED Engine #2 (dyn_std = stdev(abs(open-close), 100), dynStdMult default 5.0), same color on both bars, FAUNA on bar[1] AND bar[2], bar[0] confirms FVG (low > high[2] / high < low[2]). v2: FVG check now mandatory.
Rolling visual-bar window: ≥X events in last Y visual bars over denVisBull/denVisBear. Fires once per cluster (re-arms when count drops below X). Defaults: X=2, Y=2.
roots.composition_note: denVisBull/denVisBear (lines 1057-1058) is composed of det_bullTNT/det_contBull/det_rcTRBull/det_ptBull/det_prBull/det_bullNapalm/sig_rcNTBull/det_rcRNBull/det_pnBull — i.e. Density is a composite of Tier-1/Tier-2 atoms. Treated here as a NAMED primitive per task definition list.

Same engine as Density1, defaults X=2 Y=6 (looser window for sparse-but-clustered events).

composites.plain_english: Master Bear OR-gate: fires on bar[1] when ANY enabled Bear combo (Heavy Yin-Yang Bear, Heavy Nagasaki Bear, Heavy Nagasaki Vol Bear, Heavy Trident Bear, Neutral Heavy x2 Bear) co-occurs with displacement+FVG (dispBear). composites.plain_english: Master Neutral OR-gate: fires on bar[0] when ANY enabled Neutral combo (Heavy Yin-Yang Neutral, Heavy Nagasaki Neutral, Heavy Nagasaki Vol Neutral, Heavy Trident Neutral, Neutral Heavy x2 Neutral) occurs while there is NO displacement (noDisp = NOT dispBull AND NOT dispBear). composites.plain_english: Re-plot ultra-combo's local Nagasaki signal (volume > prior all-time max) with its own NAGA flag — purely a passthrough of an internal RVOL atom for visibility
composites.notes: ultra-combo redefines sigNagasaki locally from raw bar volume; documented as a passthrough of the canonical Heavy-Weapon Nagasaki for cross-indicator chaining purposes.

composites.description: OR of all 12 T3 signals + Nagasaki - drives the consolidated 'Any T3 Signal or Nagasaki' alertcondition (line 861).
OR of all 12 zone-creation flags - drives the 'Any Zone Formation' alertcondition (line 1136) and the Bloomberg ZONE_FORMATION alert payload (lines 1138-1164).

Mutually-exclusive overlap engine. Each bar redraws all zones from lower_*/upper_* arrays in tier-priority order A->B->C->D->E->F. f_process_zones tracks already-drawn overlap rectangles and asks f_count_overlaps how many hits the current zone has - 0 = full top+bottom+mid+fill, 1 = solid mid only, 2 = dotted mid w2, 3+ = dotted mid w1. Bull and bear streams tracked separately. This is the 'mutually exclusive state markers' the indicator name promises.
composites.rendered_in: Chart price layer - lines and linefills, persisted via drawn_lines/drawn_fills arrays cleared each bar.

composites.description: bpa..bpf and spa..spf - per-tier sums of vol across active bull/bear zones. Direct outputs of f_vob. Used as denominators in T3 dominance test, in Bloomberg alert payloads, in emission table rows, in log.info stream, and in audit-table pct% computations.
Total active-zone counts across all six tiers each side. Surfaced in TOTALS row of emission table (1245) and BULLZONES/BEARZONES alert fields.
Across all tiers, min distance % from close to any active bull/bear zone mid (-1 if none). Surfaced in TOTALS row, alerts, log stream.
Sum across tiers of zones whose mid is within stack_thresh_pct % of close. >=3 colors lime in tables - the 'stacking near price' confluence indicator.
Min % distance from close to nearest opposing zone above (bull_gap) or below (bear_gap). 'Room to run' before hitting resistance/support.

'YES - HIGH CONVICTION BULL/BEAR PANCAKE' when stk_*>=3 and gap>=30%; 'PARTIAL' if stacked but gap<30; else 'NO'. Rendered in PANCAKE row of emission table (1277-1285). The named composite confluence the indicator surfaces for human + Claude reads.
Single alertcondition consolidating all 13 T3+Nagasaki triggers; saves alertcondition slot budget.
Single alertcondition for any of 12 zone-formation events.

Per-T3-fire alert() with pipe-delimited Bloomberg-format payload built by f_bloomberg_t3 - includes ticker, exchange, TF, signal, tier, sens, dir, close, vol, vol-rank, RSI, sess bar, both pools, all aggregate metrics, and EMA slope. Nagasaki has its own simpler payload at line 904.
On any_zone, emits ZONE_FORMATION pipe-delimited alert with all aggregate metrics plus a comma-list ZONES: tag enumerating which tier+direction(s) fired this bar.
Per-zone-birth label.new at the new zone's mid, carrying 'DIR|TIER|SENS:.|VOL:.|POOL:.|RSI:.|SESS:.|SLOPE:.' metadata for the data_get_pine_labels emission channel. Gated by en_emission_labels.
log.info VOB_EMISSION pipe-delimited per-confirmed-bar stream for the pine_get_console channel. 34 fields including all six per-tier bull/bear pools and slope_ema_a..f.

Top-left 9x20 table on barstate.islast - headers + DEFINITIONS legend row + 12 tier-direction data rows (f_emit_row) + TOTALS row + MARKET snapshot (RSI, sess, vol, vrank, ATH, close) + INPUTS row + PANCAKE row. The 'richest single source of truth' per file comments.

Audit table at user-positioned location showing Last 1/2/3 zone events per tier+direction (pulled from hb_*/hs_* hist arrays via f_evt_cell), plus a NAG row for the most recent Nagasaki events. Date string + abbreviated vol + rounded pct of pool.
Bottom-left 5x15 table - Last 1/2/3 events for each of 12 T3 signals plus NAG row plus an ATH row showing maxVolEver. f_t3_cell-based.
Counts consecutive strictly-ascending non-na tier mids walking F->E->D->C->B->A. Range 0..6. Any na or non-strictly-greater tier truncates the ladder at that point.
composites.rendered_in: Top-right table 'Depth N/6' cell (lines 207-209), color-coded gray<2 / yellow 2-3 / lime>=4.

composites.description: True on a confirmed bar where ladder_depth strictly increased vs prev_depth. Drives every plotshape and alert.

composites.alert_message: VOB Ladder reached depth 2 (zF + zE ascending). Ticker on watch.
composites.description: First escalation — zF and zE present and ascending. 'Put it on radar' per CHANGELOG rationale.

composites.alert_message: VOB Ladder reached depth 3 (zF + zE + zD ascending). Escalating.
VOB Ladder reached depth 4 (zF..zC ascending). High conviction.
VOB Ladder reached depth 5 (zF..zB ascending). Strong trend.
VOB Ladder FULL — all 6 tiers ascending zF->zA. Drop everything.
composites.description: Maximum escalation — full F->A monotonic ascending stack.

Pipe-delimited alert() payload fired once-per-bar-close on any escalation, encoding TICKER, TF, NY-tz TIME, DEPTH, all six tier prices (na safe), and CLOSE. Gated by show_alerts input. Companion to the per-tier alertcondition lines.

Top-right 2x8 table rendered on barstate.islast. Header row shows 'Depth N/6' (color-coded by depth threshold). Six body rows show zF..zA labels with current top-active mid prices (em-dash when na). Each body row uses f_zone_cell helper.
